left_shoulder_abduction.description: Reduced left shoulder excursion may indicate impaired frontal-plane arm lift.

right_shoulder_abduction.description: Reduced right shoulder excursion may indicate impaired frontal-plane arm lift.

left_elbow_flexion.description: Limited left elbow flexion-extension suggests reduced reaching adaptability.

right_elbow_flexion.description: Limited right elbow flexion-extension suggests reduced reaching adaptability.

left_hip_flexion.description: Reduced left hip excursion may impair limb advancement during gait.

right_hip_flexion.description: Reduced right hip excursion may impair limb advancement during gait.

left_knee_flexion.description: Reduced left knee flexion may limit swing-phase foot clearance.

right_knee_flexion.description: Reduced right knee flexion may limit swing-phase foot clearance.

asymmetry_pairs.description: Shoulder ROM asymmetry may reflect unilateral motor deficit or compensation.
Elbow ROM asymmetry may indicate unequal arm recruitment.
Hip ROM asymmetry may indicate compensatory gait strategy.
Knee ROM asymmetry may indicate impaired swing mechanics.
